Lyrics.text:
Jesosy ô, arotsahy,
Hivatravatra tokoa,
Ho aminay ny Fanahy
‘Lay ranonorana soa.

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Ry andon’aina (andon’aina)
Tondrahy izahay
Fa tena karakaina,
Velombelomy indray
Amen, amen.

Midina ô, ry Fanahy,
Hanenika ny fonay,
Hanala ny ahiahy,
Hitari-dalana anay.

Ny irinay ry Fanahy,
Ho vavolombelonao,
Ho mahatoky sy sahy
Hamabo fo ho Anao.

Amboary mba ho mpandova
Fiainana mandrakizay;
Ka ny fonay ho voaova
Ho tena lapan’ny Ray.
